cat.title: Category
cat.description: Tax category code from those available inside a region.

key.title: Key
key.description:
Key usually identifies the tax rate key this note applies to (e.g. "exempt",
"reverse-charge"), but may also be used for other identifiers depending on context.

text.title: Text
text.description: Text contains the exemption reason or explanation.

Note.description: Note represents a tax-related note, typically used for exemption reasons or other tax-specific explanations that need to be associated with a particular tax category.
